info.name: Dashboard
info.description: Branch-level KPI summary: today's sales, active shift, low-stock and expiry counts.

request.description: Returns branch KPIs in one round trip: today revenue + sale count, month-to-date revenue + sale count, active shift snapshot (null if none open), low-stock item count, and expiring-soon batch count (30-day window). All sub-queries run in parallel.
